de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst

Class ProgramSVInstantiation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.ProgramSVInstantiation

  • public class ProgramSVInstantiation
extends java.lang.Object
    this class wrapps a ImmMap and is used to store instantiations of schemavariables. The class is immutable, this means changing its content will result in creating a new object.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static ProgramSVInstantiation EMPTY_PROGRAMSVINSTANTIATION
      the empty instantiation

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods

      adds the given pair to the instantiations.
      boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj)
      returns true if the given object and this one have the same listpings
      JavaProgramElement getInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv)
      returns the instantiation of the given SchemaVariable
      int hashCode() 
      boolean isInstantiated(SchemaVariable sv)
      returns true iff the sv has been instantiated already
      java.util.Iterator<ProgramSVEntry> iterator()
      returns iterator of the listped pair (SchemaVariables, JavaProgramElement)
      ProgramSVInstantiation replace(SchemaVariable sv, JavaProgramElement prgElement)
      replaces the given pair in the instantiations.
      int size()
      returns the number of SchemaVariables of which an instantiation is known
      java.lang.String toString()
      toString

    • Field Detail

      • EMPTY_PROGRAMSVINSTANTIATION

        public static final ProgramSVInstantiation EMPTY_PROGRAMSVINSTANTIATION
        the empty instantiation

    • Method Detail

      • add

        public ProgramSVInstantiation add(SchemaVariable sv,
                                  JavaProgramElement prgElement)
        adds the given pair to the instantiations. If the given SchemaVariable has been instantiated already, the new pair is taken without a warning.
        Parameters:
        sv - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
        prgElement - the JavaProgramElement The SchemaVariable is instantiated with
        Returns:
        ProgramSVInstantiation the new ProgramSVInstantiation containing the given pair

      • replace

        public ProgramSVInstantiation replace(SchemaVariable sv,
                                      JavaProgramElement prgElement)
        replaces the given pair in the instantiations. If the given SchemaVariable has been instantiated already, the new pair is taken without a warning.
        Parameters:
        sv - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
        prgElement - the JavaProgramElement The SchemaVariable is instantiated with
        Returns:
        ProgramSVInstantiation the new ProgramSVInstantiation containing the given pair

      • isInstantiated

        public boolean isInstantiated(SchemaVariable sv)
        returns true iff the sv has been instantiated already
        Returns:
        true iff the sv has been instantiated already

      • getInstantiation

        public JavaProgramElement getInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv)
        returns the instantiation of the given SchemaVariable
        Returns:
        the JavaProgramElement the SchemaVariable will be instantiated with, null if no instantiation is stored

      • iterator

        public java.util.Iterator<ProgramSVEntry> iterator()
        returns iterator of the listped pair (SchemaVariables, JavaProgramElement)
        Returns:
        the Iterator>

      • size

        public int size()
        returns the number of SchemaVariables of which an instantiation is known
        Returns:
        int that is the number of SchemaVariables of which an instantiation is known

      • equals

        public boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj)
        returns true if the given object and this one have the same listpings

        Returns:
